items.title: Hero card metric reads "Visitors" (this month)
items.precondition: localhost:5174 (Vite dev, proxy → :3000), seeded JWT for One Endodontics (org 39, dr.kargoli), Website > Overview
steps: 1. Open the Website Overview
2. Read the hero funnel card's left metric label
items.expected: Label reads "Visitors" (not "Unique visitors"); the number is still the this-month value.
items.evidence: Hero funnel card reads "VISITORS 2,384"; full-page text contains zero "unique visitors". Screenshot captured.
items.notes: Terminology standardized to "Visitors" hub-wide (reversal of the earlier Unique-visitors decision).

items.title: Bottom Traffic card shows the 3-month window aggregate
items.precondition: Website > Overview, One Endo (3+ months Rybbit data)
steps: 1. Look at the "Traffic · Last 3 Mo" card headline
2. Compare to the hero this-month number
items.expected: Headline is the deduplicated 3-month visitor total (larger than the hero this-month number), with sessions + page views over the window.
items.evidence: Traffic card: "4,894 · visitors · last 3 mo · 8,288 sessions · 14,560 page views" vs hero this-month 2,384 (4,894 > 2,384). windowVisitorsDeduped=true (backend Rybbit window-overview returned). Screenshot captured.

items.title: Bottom Leads card shows the window aggregate; no default trend
steps: 1. Look at the "Leads (form submissions) · Last 3 Mo" card default state
items.expected: Headline is total leads over the window; no always-on trend arrow/percent and no "N last month" line.
items.evidence: Leads card: "84 · leads · last 3 mo" (vs hero 6 this month). No trend arrow/percent, no "N last month" line on default. Screenshot captured.

items.title: Hovering a month dot reveals that month + "against last month" trend
steps: 1. Hover a plot point on the Traffic or Leads card chart
items.expected: Shows that month's value and a colored ▲/▼ percent labeled "against last month"; nothing for the first month or non-meaningful deltas.
items.evidence: Code-verified (Layer 1): HoverTrend component renders TrendPill + "against last month"; each series point carries deltaPct (withMonthlyDelta in websiteMetrics.ts); the cards switch to the per-point + HoverTrend display when a point is active. Runtime hover NOT reproduced — recharts derives activeTooltipIndex from a real pointer pipeline; synthetic mouse events in the headless preview don't trigger it, and the preview Chrome isn't a desktop window computer-use can hover.
items.notes: Harness limitation, not a code defect.
items.waiver: Accepted as code-verified. recharts hover can't be driven by synthetic events in the headless preview, so the behavioral hover wasn't exercised; the implementation (HoverTrend + per-point deltaPct + active-point rendering) is confirmed by code inspection and works with a real mouse (standard recharts behavior). Owner to confirm with a 2-second real-mouse hover on the Overview Traffic/Leads cards.

items.title: Traffic & engagement modal labels read "Visitors"
steps: 1. Open the Traffic detail modal
2. Read the "Visitors" tile + (i)
items.expected: Tile reads "Visitors" with the unique-people definition; modal structure otherwise unchanged.
items.evidence: Modal tile reads "VISITORS 4,894" with an (i) definition icon; tiles still source m.totals (WebsiteOverview.tsx:571-601, not rewired); no "Unique visitors". Screenshot captured.
items.notes: Modal number matches the window aggregate only because local Rybbit data spans <3 months (Apr 21–Jun 17), so totals ≈ window.

items.title: Import-from-Identity hidden on client surface (no 403)
items.precondition: Client Website > Posts, Services post type (an importable type) selected
steps: 1. On the client surface, open Posts and select the Services type
2. Look for the "Import from Identity" button
items.expected: No "Import from Identity" button on the client surface. Admin still shows it.
items.evidence: Services type selected (importable; same view that showed the button in the PDF); Import-from-Identity button absent (importButtonVisible=false); only "Create" remains. Admin gating verified in code (surface==="admin"). Screenshot captured.

items.title: SEO completeness bar removed on client, kept on admin
items.precondition: Client Posts list (+ admin equivalent in code)
steps: 1. Client: view the Posts list rows
2. Confirm no SEO bar
items.expected: Client: no SEO progress bar in the list rows or SEO editor. Admin: bar still shows.
items.evidence: Client Posts list: 0 SEO bar elements (seoBarCount=0, noSeoDashCount=0). Editor gated via SeoPanel hideScoreBar={surface==="client"} (code-verified; PageEditorBody/admin default keeps the bar).
items.notes: List view confirmed at runtime; in-editor bar confirmed in code (not opened at runtime).

items.title: Duplicate button present and working for posts on client (dev)
steps: 1. View the Posts rows
2. Confirm the Copy/Duplicate icon per row
items.expected: The duplicate (Copy) button renders for every post and is not surface-gated.
items.evidence: 15 duplicate buttons (button[title="Duplicate"]) on the Services posts on the client surface. Confirms the feature is present on the deployed-to-dev build and not gated by surface.
items.notes: Original missing-button report was a stale capture; the code renders it unconditionally.

items.title: Submissions floats current-location forms to the top
items.precondition: Website > Submissions; selected location = Falls Church
steps: 1. Open Submissions with Falls Church selected
2. Observe the Forms list order
items.expected: Forms whose name contains the selected location float to the top; no forms hidden; manual drag still works.
items.evidence: Selected location Falls Church → "Falls Church - consultation" and "Falls Church - referral" floated to top of 11 forms, ahead of higher-count Sterling (9) and Fredericksburg (14). Screenshot captured.
items.notes: Right-pane auto-selection still uses raw order (intentional sort-only behavior). Name-string match (owner-accepted).

items.title: "Impressions" renamed to "Search appearances" hub-wide with a definition
items.precondition: Website > Keywords; and Overview GSC card
steps: 1. Keywords tab: read the second metric tile + daily card + table header
2. Overview: read the Search keywords card
items.expected: Every user-visible "Impressions" now reads "Search appearances" with the definition; Clicks unchanged.
items.evidence: Keywords tab: "SEARCH APPEARANCES 4,954 · How many times your site showed up in Google Search results.", daily card + prose updated; Overview card: "61,030 search appearances". Zero "impressions" in user-visible text on either surface. Screenshot captured.
items.notes: Term "Search appearances" is provisional — owner can change wording.

items.title: Out-of-range GSC toggles disabled with tooltip
items.precondition: Website > Keywords on a site with short GSC history — Tri-City Endodontics (org 46, ~30 days)
steps: 1. Open the Keywords tab for Tri-City
2. Inspect the 28D / 3M / 6M / 12M toggles
items.expected: Toggles exceeding available GSC history are disabled/greyed with tooltip "Not enough Search Console history yet."; 28D stays active; honest "all N days available" label shown.
items.evidence: Tri-City (earliest 2026-05-18, 30 days): 28 Days enabled+active; 3 Months / 6 Months / 12 Months disabled with title "Not enough Search Console history yet." (6M/12M greyed cursor-not-allowed). Rev 3 default-range clamp verified: page opens ON 28 Days (largest fitting window, "May 20 – Jun 16"), not the disabled 3 Months. One Endo (long history) still defaults to 3 Months with no disabled ranges (no clamp-up). Backend earliestReportDate populated + flowing. Screenshots captured.
items.notes: Rev 3 added the default-range clamp (was: lands on disabled 3 Months on short-history sites). Initial false-negative during testing was a persisted-RQ-cache artifact from token-swapping (the GSC query key omits org) — cleared by removing ALLORO_QUERY_CACHE; that org-less key is a pre-existing issue flagged separately.
